title: marginaria collinsii
intro: Marginaria collinsii, also known as the collar Lilyturf or Margaret, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae, commonly found in South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Marginaria collinsii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction by infusing the leaves in hot water, making it a popular herbal remedy among locals.
